publicationStmt.p: This XML text (filename tlg2045003.xml) was generated by Diogenes (version 4.6.2) from the TLG corpus of classical texts (author number 2045, work number 003), which was once distributed on CD-ROM in a very different file format, and which may be subject to licensing restrictions.

div.l: Πᾶσα γυνὴ φιλέει πλέον ἀνέρος, αἰδομένη δὲ
κεύθει κέντρον ἔρωτος ἐρωμανέουσα καὶ αὐτή.
